visual_intent: introductory mitochondria education that feels approachable rather than technical
brand_guardrails: keep the post minimal, intelligent, and premium
avoid neon biohacking or aggressive supplement-ad aesthetics
preserve generous text-safe whitespace on every slide
no hospital, lab-equipment, or heavy medical CGI cues
do not imply treatment, recovery, anti-aging, or guaranteed functional outcomes
match mood, palette, light quality, whitespace, and restraint from the selected references without duplicating exact crop, pose, object placement, or gradient pattern
composition: centered or slightly offset focal structure
subtle abstract science cue only, never a busy diagram
white-led educational layout with calm mobile readability
product absent or reduced to a near-invisible brand-presence detail only on the final card
reference_strategy: Use the education-layout anchor for spacing and hierarchy, the cool-palette anchor for tonality and light quality, and the CTA-layout anchor only for the final save card rhythm.
variation_guardrails: do not reuse exact paragraph blocks or text placement from anchors
rotate focal placement between centered and slightly offset layouts
keep apricot accent use below 10 percent of the frame
avoid using the same background wash on every slide
keep the carousel more introductory and education-first than campaign-like

slides_ja: 毎日の土台を支える小さな存在
ミトコンドリアは、細胞の中でエネルギー産生に関わる存在です。
このテーマが注目されるのは、日々のコンディションの土台として考えられているから。
難しい話に見えても、まずは基礎を知ることが第一歩です。
毎日の習慣を見つめるときも、こうした基礎理解が静かなヒントになります。
保存して、あとで見返せる基礎知識に。

negative_prompts: capsule explosion or flashy supplement advertising
heavy 3D mitochondria render with medical drama
reference_files: brand/references/business-context/strategy/Mitozz Japan Brand Voice And Messaging Guidelines.docx.pdf
notes: March 23 feed-only educational carousel. Introduce mitochondria in a calm, premium, easy-to-save format that feels intelligent rather than technical. Keep the Steel Light system consistent while varying crop, focal placement, and background treatment across variants.
